The honest situation
"Most business owners know AI matters. Far fewer know what to actually do about it. The noise around it isn't getting any quieter. That's exactly where we come in."

Where most businesses get stuck

Three patterns we see again and again.

Doing nothing

Quietly worrying they're falling behind, watching competitors move while staying still.

Buying tools

That don't talk to each other, don't solve the real problems, and mostly collect dust.

Running pilots

That start with excitement and end with a slide deck no one acts on.

None of those is where you want to be. With the right guidance, AI genuinely can shift the needle on revenue, on efficiency, on the hours you spend on things that machines should be doing for you.

You don't need to become a technology expert. You need someone who knows the AI landscape and can translate that into clear decisions for your business.

340%

Average 3-year ROI for SME AI projects (Deloitte, 2026)

1 in 9

Businesses currently using AI in production. The rest are still figuring it out. (Deloitte, 2026)

30 yrs

Of introducing clients to new technologies and internal change management

Every journey starts with understanding the terrain

Five services. One clear path forward.

Presented in journey sequence. From not knowing where to start, to having AI genuinely working for your business.

01
AI Readiness Audit

An honest, scored assessment of your business across six dimensions: strategy and leadership, data, technology, people, processes, and culture. You get a clear written picture of where you are and a prioritised view of what to tackle first. Most client relationships start here.

Find out more →
02
AI Strategy & Roadmap

Turn good intentions into a plan you can actually follow. Built around your specific goals, budget, and realistic capabilities, with a phased roadmap that means something happens on Monday morning, not after the next planning cycle.

Find out more →
03
Implementation Support

Tool selection, systems integration, team onboarding, and change management. Hands-on and collaborative, because the plan is only as good as what actually happens next.

Find out more →
04
Ongoing Advisory

Your fractional AI strategist, available whenever you need one. Regular sessions, unlimited questions, proactive briefings on what's changing. Limited availability.

Find out more →
05
AI Literacy Workshops

Your team has questions about AI they haven't been able to ask anywhere. Practical, hands-on workshops built around your specific business, your actual tools, and those questions. Half-day or full-day, in-person or remote. Never a generic deck.

Find out more →

Justin Yeaman
Founder, Yea I Consulting

Why Yea I Consulting?

Not all AI consultants are the same.

Most come from one of two places. They're either technologists who know the tools but struggle to speak the language of business, or generalists who've read the right reports but haven't spent years working inside real organisations with real budgets and real pressure.

We come from somewhere different.

"Thirty years inside marketing agencies means I've sat in every kind of client meeting imaginable. I've wrestled with tight budgets, navigated difficult change, and had to show real ROI on decisions that mattered. That's what I bring to AI strategy."
◎
Straight talk, not sales pitches

If AI isn't the right answer for something, we'll say so. Full stop.

→
30 years of real business experience

The judgement to know the difference between a genuinely useful tool and an expensive distraction.

You talk to the person doing the work

Every diagnostic, report, and conversation handled directly by Justin. No handoffs, no juniors.
